text:
Mars contacts the Moon first, next
Ketu and later on Venus). With Jupiter in the second to Venus aspected by
Mars, she will come into'p ossession of a house, and get financial aid through
her husband. When Jupiter transits Gemini she will become a mother (Jupiter
represents life, Venus represents the seed, Gemini 11th or house of fulfilment,
hence birth of child). She will have two sons and one daughter. The husband
will earn by providing food and drinks to the public.
If the native be a male he will have happiness through two women. He
will earn through machinery. He will receive honours from Government. By
38, he would have a house and all kinds of conveyances. From 45 onwards,
he will get help from his children. He will move abroad and live upto the age
of70. ·.

258 BHRIGU NANDI NADI

happens to be a second wife. Fear in Moon Dt.
terferes with her marital happiness.
